title: Subitem Header
excerpt:
Subitem header. 
Is there a way to fix (freeze pain) the header for the subitems? 
At the moment when I scroll down the page the header disappears and you do not know what columns are.

posts.author: Jorgen (Jorgen )
posts.cookedHtml:
Subitem header.

Is there a way to fix (freeze pain) the header for the subitems?
At the moment when I scroll down the page the header disappears and you do not know what columns are.

On a Mobile device the column names are fixed so you can read what they are.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jorgen!

I think I might have answered this question on the FB group but unfortunately, this is not possible at this time. It’s a great idea though and worth adding to the feature requests in the Community!
